info.name: Chamade — AI Agent for Talk
info.summary: Connect AI agents to Nextcloud Talk — chat and voice via Chamade
info.description:
**Chamade Talk** lets AI agents join your Nextcloud Talk conversations for chat and voice interactions.
### How it works [Chamade](https://chamade.io) is a voice gateway for AI agents. This app connects your Nextcloud Talk instance to Chamade, so AI agents can: - Receive and reply to chat messages in Talk rooms - Join voice calls (requires Nextcloud High Performance Backend) - Be scoped to specific rooms via `/activate` and `/deactivate` commands
### Features - **Owner-scoped bots**: each bot is tied to the Nextcloud user who authorized it - **Room authorization**: bots only respond in DMs from their owner or in rooms where `/activate` was used - **Text-only fallback**: works without HPB (chat only, no voice) - **HMAC-secured API**: all communication between Chamade and this app is authenticated
### Setup 1. Install this app on your Nextcloud instance 2. In your Chamade dashboard, click "Connect Nextcloud Talk" 3. Approve the authorization request on your Nextcloud instance 4. Start chatting with your AI agent in Talk
info.author: Skilpa
